title: Debugging, Review, and Adversarial Prompting · Production Prompt Mission
summary: A software maintenance team. The team needs one task contract adapted and verified for both Claude Code and Codex. Planned artifact: Deliver Cross-Agent Repository Change Brief with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Name desired behavior, relevant area, preserved contracts, and authorized refactor scope.
Specify risk-proportionate tests and observable regression checks.
Capture a minimal reproduction, exact error, environment, and last-known-good boundary before repair.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.prompt:
# Cross-agent prompt portfolio
# Add tested contracts below. Keep shared intent separate from Claude and Codex adaptations.
